description_long: This is a stylized beer mug with a robust cylindrical body made of dark, wood-textured material, encircled by a thick, metallic-looking rim at the top and a matching band at the base. The mug features a prominent handle, wrapped in a green, ribbed grip, attached to the side with visible wooden ends. Around the lower circumference, there are decorative metallic studs set in diamond-shaped mounts, adding a rugged, medieval flair. The wood grain is clearly visible, giving the mug a hand-crafted appearance, while the metal bands show subtle scratches and wear. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding liquid, and the overall design suggests durability and comfort for gripping. The color palette is dominated by earthy browns, muted greens, and dark metallic grays.
description: A rugged, wood-and-metal beer mug with a green-wrapped handle and decorative studs, featuring a hand-crafted, medieval look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green-wrapped handle centered, with the wood grain and metallic rim clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the handle and the diamond-shaped studs around the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted wood texture and decorative studs, with no handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle from the other side, emphasizing the green grip and wood-metal contrast.
attribute_graphic_design: The exterior features a wood grain pattern with metallic bands and diamond-shaped studs, complemented by a green, ribbed handle wrap. The design is rustic and medieval, with no visible text or logos.
